settings.heading: A practical landing page fallback for RBP pathways
settings.text: This compatibility template keeps existing RBP landing pages rendering while each page is assigned to its specific Advisory, Consulting, Implementation, Operations Hub, Essentials, Membership or Support template.

settings.heading: Start with the kind of support you need
settings.text: Use this temporary landing structure to route visitors without relying on one-off page sections.

settings.title: Advisory
settings.text: Decision support, business review and next-step planning.

settings.title: Consulting
settings.text: Structured project support, recommendations and roadmaps.

settings.title: Implementation
settings.text: Setup, delivery, onboarding and practical business infrastructure.

settings.heading: Move from broad landing content to focused pages
settings.text: This fallback keeps transition pages usable while the new page-specific templates take over.

settings.title: Operations Hub
settings.text: Services, resources, marketplace links and support for operating work.

settings.title: Essentials
settings.text: Templates, toolkits and practical resource pathways.

settings.title: Support
settings.text: Contact, onboarding, FAQs and support routing.

settings.heading: Reusable sections, not one-off landing files
settings.text: The template uses existing RBP and Trade modules so merchants can keep editing content in the Theme Editor.

settings.title: Modular layout
settings.text: Built from existing RBP sections instead of monolithic page Liquid.

settings.title: Theme-editor friendly
settings.text: Cards, FAQs, links and CTAs remain editable through section settings and blocks.

settings.title: Temporary fallback
settings.text: Use this for transition pages, then assign the focused page-specific templates.

settings.heading: Keep pages working while assignments change
settings.text: The compatibility template prevents old rbp-landing assignments from breaking during the migration.

settings.title: Create focused templates
settings.text: Add page-specific JSON templates for the header menu landing pages.

settings.title: Assign pages
settings.text: Move each Shopify page from rbp-landing to the correct specific template.

settings.title: Retain fallback
settings.text: Keep rbp-landing available until no transitional pages depend on it.

settings.heading: Compatibility template notes
settings.text: This template is intentionally general and should not replace the focused page-specific templates long term.

settings.question: Why keep a compatibility template?
settings.answer: Several Shopify pages may already use the rbp-landing suffix. Keeping this template prevents blank or broken rendering while assignments are updated.

settings.question: Should every page use this long term?
settings.answer: No. Advisory, Consulting, Implementation, Operations Hub, Essentials, Membership and Support should use their specific templates.

settings.heading: Assign each page to its focused template
settings.text: Use this compatibility page only as a safe transition fallback.
